title: Products & SKUs
subtitle: Manage your product catalog and variants
searchPlaceholder: Search by name, SKU, or barcode...
allProductsDescription: Complete list of products and their variants
noProductsDescription: No products match your search. Try adjusting your filters or add a new product.

list.title: Products — Quick Guide
list.search: Search products by name or SKU
list.status: ACTIVE = live, DRAFT = hidden, INACTIVE = disabled
list.newProduct: Click + New Product to create a new product with variants
list.detail: Click a product row to view details, edit, or manage images

detail.title: Product Detail — Quick Guide
detail.edit: Click Edit to update product name, status, or description
detail.delete: Delete permanently removes this product and all its variants
detail.variants: Variants define specific SKUs, sizes, and colors
detail.images: Add image URLs. Lower sort order = displayed first

create.title: Create Product
create.subtitle: Add a new product to the catalog

form.title: Product Details
form.description: Fill in the details below to create a new product
form.name: Product Name
form.categoryIdsHelper: Optional — enter category IDs separated by commas

validation.titleMax: Product name must be 255 characters or less
validation.descriptionMax: Description must be 2000 characters or less
validation.brandMax: Brand must be 100 characters or less

detail.notFoundDescription: The product you are looking for does not exist or has been deleted.
detail.deleteConfirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. The product will be permanently deleted.

variants.title: Variants
variants.description: SKU variants associated with this product
variants.noVariantsDescription: Variants define the specific SKUs, sizes, and colors for this product.

images.title: Product Images
images.noImagesDescription: Add image URLs to display product images.
images.deleteConfirmDescription: This image will be removed from the product.
